## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Deployment/configuration change

## Testing

- [ ] I ran `pnpm install`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm lint`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm type-check`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm build`
- [ ] I tested the affected user flow manually

## Production Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials were committed
- [ ] No business logic was removed accidentally
- [ ] Database changes are backward compatible or documented
- [ ] Environment variable changes are documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] UI changes are responsive on mobile and desktop

## Screenshots / Recordings

Add screenshots or videos for UI changes.

## Notes for Reviewer

Mention risks, migration steps, or follow-up tasks.
